title: Antora Supplemental UI Module Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for a composable Antora UI module. Indexers read this file; npm is optional.

id.description: Stable module identifier within a repository or org namespace.

name.description: Human-readable module name for registry listings.

version.description: Semver of this module manifest and bundled UI assets.

type.description: ui-module ships UI assets; ui-recipe lists modules to enable together.

requires.description: Module ids that must be enabled before this module.

recommends.description: Optional modules commonly paired with this one.

conflicts.description: Module ids that cannot be enabled at the same time as this module.

stylesheets.description: CSS paths relative to the module ui/ root.

scripts.description: Inline script files (e.g. FOUC prevention) injected early in head.

links.description: Raw HTML link tags injected into head.

fragments.description: Handlebars snippet files (under ui/) merged into head-meta.

scripts.description: JS asset paths appended after Default UI footer scripts.

provide.description: New partial stems (fragment components) for manual inclusion.

replace.description: Partial stems this module overrides in the UI bundle.

modules.description: For type ui-recipe only: ordered module ids to enable.
